title: tocoyena formosa var. microdon
intro: Tocoyena formosa var. microdon, also known as the yellow-flowering Tocoyena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tocoyena formosa var. microdon include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Tocoyena formosa var. microdon include infusions and decoctions made from its leaves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
